# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Google Compute Engine instances. Use default service account and default disk encryption settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting instances running - we'll add custom encryption keys and security hardening in phase 2.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cloud compute security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

resources:
- name: vm-instance
  type: compute.v1.instance
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    machineType: zones/us-central1-a/machineTypes/n1-standard-1
    disks:
    - deviceName: boot-disk
      type: PERSISTENT
      boot: true
      autoDelete: true
      initializeParams:
        sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-11
        diskSizeGb: 20
        diskType: zones/us-central1-a/diskTypes/pd-ssd
      diskEncryptionKey:
        rawKey: $(ref.encryption-key.value)
    networkInterfaces:
    - network: global/networks/default
      accessConfigs: []
    serviceAccounts:
    - email: vm-dedicated-sa@{{ env["project"] }}.iam.gserviceaccount.com
      scopes:
      - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/devstorage.read_only
      - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/logging.write
      - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/monitoring.write
    metadata:
      items:
      - key: enable-oslogin
        value: "TRUE"
      - key: block-project-ssh-keys
        value: "TRUE"
    shieldedInstanceConfig:
      enableSecureBoot: true
      enableVtpm: true
      enableIntegrityMonitoring: true
    canIpForward: false
    deletionProtection: true
    tags:
      items:
      - restricted-access

- name: vm-firewall-rule
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: global/networks/default
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
    - 10.0.0.0/8
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - "22"
    targetTags:
    - restricted-access

- name: encryption-key
  type: cloudkms.v1.cryptoKey
  properties:
    parent: projects/{{ env["project"] }}/locations/us-central1/keyRings/vm-keyring
    purpose: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
    versionTemplate:
      algorithm: GOOGLE_SYMMETRIC_ENCRYPTION
      protectionLevel: SOFTWARE

outputs:
- name: instanceName
  value: $(ref.vm-instance.name)
- name: instanceSelfLink
  value: $(ref.vm-instance.selfLink)
